actions.name: BatchCreateUser

actions.description: Grants permission to batch delete users from a Wickr network

actions.description: Grants permission to batch lookup user unames in a Wickr network

actions.description: Grants permission to batch reinvite users in a Wickr network

actions.description: Grants permission to batch reset devices for a user in a Wickr network

actions.name: BatchToggleUserSuspendStatus
actions.description: Grants permission to batch toggle user suspend status in a Wickr network

actions.name: CreateAdminSession
